---
title: "Ebrahim Alhaddad"
image: "files/untitled.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:efalhadd@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/efalhadd/
---

::: {.hero}

# Welcome to my website!!

Hello! I’m **Ebrahim Alhaddad**, a software engineer and MSBA candidate at UC San Diego.

This site is mainly dedicated to my work in the analytics domain, including projects, technical writeups, and experiments involving data, search, evaluation, and business problem-solving.

While analytics is not the only area I work in, it is a space I’m actively exploring through my MSBA and technical projects. My broader background sits at the intersection of software engineering, data analytics, AI/search workflows, and customer-facing problem-solving.


[Explore my projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

:::
